entry.title: fable-advisor
entry.content: Consult Claude Fable 5 as a strategic advisor at costly-to-revert inflection points: architecture decisions, stuck debugging, plan review, pre-completion review, and unattended loop/schedule design. Compact briefing packets, hard budget caps, terse verdicts — judgment from Fable, tokens from Opus.

entry.title: powerclaw
entry.content: Frontier operating discipline for Claude on any model: verification procedures, a pre-send self-test, and proactive loop and automation suggestions.

entry.title: delegate
entry.content: Delegate heavy or token-expensive tasks from Claude Code to Codex CLI (GPT) and Antigravity CLI (Gemini), plus an independent Claude delegate (isolated config dir, OAuth token auth) usable as a majority-of-3 third voter or an agentic worker. Write output to a file and read only the STATUS/VERDICT header to keep the main context clean.

entry.title: greentrain-planning
entry.content: Green Train planning skills: think-before-you-slide PPT methodology. Classify PPT type (pitch / research / teaching / narrative), set up research-driven thesis with six-question specificity diagnostic, and review storyline for structural fit. Pairs with visual-deck for the full pipeline.

entry.title: refable
entry.content: Run any Claude like Fable, again — verified Fable-style procedures (grounding, evidence gates, investigation, early-stop prevention) plus directed propagation, delegation economy, cold-start skill verification, and a value router. Fork-lineage: fivetaku/fablize (MIT).

entry.title: mega-orchestration

entry.title: mozart-orchestration
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration pipeline for Claude Code: DELIVER (build), AUDIT (review), DIAGNOSE (investigate). Conducts 14 specialist subagents through research, plan, review, implement, verify, document with live narration.

entry.title: agent-rules
entry.content: Always-on constitution for weak models — a SessionStart hook injects 12 hard laws (evidence before claims, reproduce before fix, minimal diff, three-strike stop, no hallucinated APIs, tests are read-only, …) plus an end-of-turn checklist into every session. Ships situational rule files (DECISIONS / SAFETY / ANTIPATTERNS). Install alongside the dev-* playbook skills.

entry.title: freud
entry.content: Deep technical analysis of services with comprehensive documentation including architecture diagrams, database schemas, sequence flows, and critical reviews.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2587 (2026-07-09, plumbing) — Agent/Bash 수행 렌더-줄 프리픽스 `[에이전트명] MM/DD HH:MM - 내용` 를 hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput 으로 기계 주입 (detect→inject repurpose; whole-echo REPLACE-safe·bare updatedInput G4·fail-open; §7.3 additionalContext(story-transition-autonomy reminder) 무조건 emit; ADR-143 Amendment 1). FIX-2: §7.3 빈-prompt reminder 회귀 봉합(early-exit→fall-through) + idempotency leading-ws 대칭 + §7.7-2 subject-field-absent SKIP(Bash EXCLUDE 대칭) + surface-specific bypass env disjoint. + CFP-2584 (2026-07-06, plumbing) — 형제 워크플로 parser-parity: CFP-2581 same-repo 가드 패턴을 auto-phase-label tier-2(relatedRegex owner/repo#N optional capture + urlRegex owner capture, fork① ADOPT) + phase-gate-auto-cleanup EC-2(.test()→matchAll+filter 구조전환)에 이식. cross-repo owner/repo#N PR body 에서 phase 라벨 상속·stale cleanup silent-degrade 제거, foreign owner/repo#N skip(context.repo 고정 spoof 차단). related-only 키워드 유지(fork②). ADR-005 mirror(.github↔templates byte-identical) 동시 편집. §8 execution-liveness: shipped .yml 파서 추출·eval harness(하드카피 0) + 변이-kill 5종. 6-tuple·evidence·advisory CI non-required 무변경. + CFP-2581 (2026-07-05, plumbing) — phase-gate-mergeable localRefs 바인딩 파서 확장(S-primary): PR body 의 canonical Story issue ref 를 owner/repo#N same-repo 표기까지 직독(정규식 optional owner/repo capture + same-repo 가드), foreign owner/repo#N 은 skip(context.repo 고정 fetch spoof 차단 — 보안 강화). cross-repo 표기 PR 이 step-3 canonical-issue 직독에 도달해 lane 마다 수동 gate-라벨/evidence 미러 마찰 제거. bare #N superset 무손상. ADR-005 mirror(.github ↔ templates byte-identical) 동시 편집. §8 execution-liveness: shipped .yml 파서 블록 추출·eval harness(하드카피 0, drift 검출) + dead phase-gate-cfp2324.test.js 재배선(S2/S6/S7). 6-tuple contexts·evidence 채널·PR-라벨 fallback 무변경(비-goal diff-0). 6.70.0 → 6.70.1 PATCH(plumbing bugfix, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2573 (2026-07-05, ADR-144) — Orchestrator 자율성 종결(stop taxonomy 3축 + decision-null pause 신설): 애매 stop(vague-pause “한 숨 쉬어가자”) 을 taxonomy 에 명명·금지(L1 advisory ADR-025 Amd3 + presence-lint) + 자명-진행 priming scope 확장(L2 advisory 전환+lane경계+완료후+vague-pause, 신규 hook 0 기존 2채널 TEXT broaden) + delivery-gap liveness 강화(L3 detection measurement/recovery advisory: PL spawn-then-blind-wait 금지 + lead-collect seam + idle marker, ADR-139 Amd1, full auto-wake dispatcher DEFER) + stop-event aggregate 신설(L5 measurement record-only aggregate_stop_event.py, row-hash dedup, reason_class PMO sidecar, “측정≠분류” honesty) + consumer 전파(L6 hooks.json 자동) + tier 정직 meta-gate(AC-6 mutation oracle: measurement/advisory 축 block/deny/강제 언어 0). GAP-1/2(pre-utterance hard-block·over-halt 실시간 검출) platform 한계 정직 문서화(hollow-gate 금지). 예방(advisory)+측정(measurement)까지만. 6.69.0 → 6.70.0 MINOR (신규 hook TEXT broaden/lint/aggregate = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2574 (2026-07-05, ADR-143) — Agent 액션 렌더 줄 프리픽스 규약: harness UI 의 Agent 스폰·도구호출 렌더 줄에 `[<agent_type>] MM/DD HH:MM - <내용>` 프리픽스 시도(범위① Agent spawn description=피스폰 agent_type / 범위② 서브에이전트 leaf 도구호출 description=self agent_type). 시각=KST(UTC+9 고정 산술, scripts/kst-render-stamp — datetime.now(timezone.utc)+9h·stdout-only·non-deprecated), 컴팩트 MM/DD HH:MM(offset/연도/초/KST 라벨 미표기, ADR-079 제3 ephemeral-UI sub-layer). TodoWrite 행 + Orchestrator inline 4종(대화/TodoWrite/읽기 Q&A/상태보고, ADR-039 whitelist) 제외. 강제 상한=advisory(no-theater, hard-gate/100% 기계강제 참칭 0): 범위①만 PreToolUse(Agent) warning-tier detect(spawn-description-prefix-detect.yml + scripts/check-spawn-description-prefix, exit-0-always·tool_input rewrite 없음), 범위②는 prompt-mandate + session-start 리마인더(mechanical 불가 정직 명문). CLAUDE.md directive + playbook 매턴 self-check + evidence-checks-registry 등록 + 컴팩트 예시 KST_TS_RE lint-inert. 13파일 초판 + FIX-1(§8 T-3 hook↔detector seam 계약이탈 해소 + no-epoch production 경로 커버리지 → test 16→24, 3-mutation replay PASS). 신규 ADR-143. 6.68.0 → 6.69.0 MINOR (신규 규약 workflow/hook = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2572 (2026-07-05, ADR-142) — Orchestrator context 무경량화: READ/synthesis/verbose-return 위임 규율(L1 advisory read-offload + trivial carve-out CLOSED 6) + L2 return-envelope-v1 tight-return wrap 계약(measurement schema-lint + advisory prompt-mandate, runtime 하드캡 기각) + L7 self-context record-only proxy telemetry(spawn-event-v1 v1.1 self-context-v1 6-field, ADR-043 Amd3, never-block/fail-VISIBLE) + 3 self-test(disjoint-axis-whitelist-lint 물리강제 / return-envelope-schema-lint measurement / self-context-telemetry-allowlist-lint measurement+emission-liveness) + playbook §3.0/§3.3 반전 + stale doc(재귀-spawn platform-inherent 오단정) 정정. 6.67.0 → 6.68.0 MINOR (신규 workflow/hook/계약 = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2563 (2026-07-03, ADR-133 Amendment 2 실배선) — ADR 번호 발급·예약 충돌 근본 해소: 기존 OCC atomic claim primitive(단일-셀 Contents API PUT sha→409, CFP-2491)를 실 ADR 발급 flow 에 실배선(built-but-unwired dead-machinery 해소) + adr-reservation-state long-lived branch 부트스트랩(seed max_adr_number=141 firsthand git ls-tree 재산출·하드코딩 금지 + branch protection allow_force_pushes:false / required_linear_history:true / enforce_admins:true + required_pull_request_reviews·required_status_checks 미설정 load-bearing — 걸면 claim direct-PUT deadlock) + agent-session write-under-protection empirical smoke(HTTP 200 실측 — R3 deadlock-avoidance 반증) + 3-way ADR 번호 uniqueness lint 신설(.github/workflows/adr-uniqueness-check.yml + scripts/lib/check-adr-uniqueness-3way.py — filename↔frontmatter adr_number↔ADR-RESERVATION row dual-key + numeric 정규화(zero-pad/quoted) + 구조적 파싱, warning tier / non-required / 6-tuple 무변경, #2182 흡수) + ADR-RESERVATION 15-row lapse backfill(idempotent append-only, scripts/lib/adr-reservation-backfill.py) + evidence-checks-registry adr-uniqueness-check warning entry 등록. 신규 ADR 0 (ADR-133 Amendment 2 만). 6.65.0 → 6.66.0 MINOR (신규 workflow adr-uniqueness-check.yml = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063, sync PR 선행 merge). + CFP-2549 (2026-07-02) — background-wait liveness gate (ADR-139) 실배선: 모든 codeforge-owned background subagent 대기(run_in_background/bg spawn)의 wall-clock 상한+liveness 관측 없는 무한 대기 결함(#763 Iter4/5)을 CFP-2545 codex-companion 의 Ports&Adapters 일반화로 근절. playbook 공통 단락 INV-L1~L4(max-wait ceiling/fail-open 금지 inconclusive/0-byte≠stall 3-state/Orchestrator 소유) + general-adapter presence lint(liveness_check_base.py base + check_subagent_wait_liveness_presence.py + byte-identical workflow, warning tier) + execution-backed self-test(124/127) + parallel-dispatch-protocol v1.1(worker_outcomes +INCONCLUSIVE) + sibling ADR-081 Amd13/ADR-039 Amd10 §결정 20. 신규 required check 0. 6.61.0 → 6.63.0 MINOR. |+ CFP-2544 (2026-07-02) — Orchestrator inline-write gate 신설 (Wave1 warning-tier): ADR-039 Amendment 9 §결정 9 deferred slot("Orchestrator inline write detect hook") 실현 + ADR-115 Amendment 1 §결정 6 scope-boundary 이관. PreToolUse(Write|Edit|MultiEdit) 물리 가드로 최상위 세션(Orchestrator)의 repo/worktree 직접 편집을 caller-scoped 검출 — 실측 83세션 127건 드리프트(worktree 95 + 직접 32) 폐지. discriminator = PreToolUse payload `agent_id` 필드 (non-empty=subagent=allow / 부재·null·""=Orchestrator=block-candidate, F2 fail-safe). path ordering invariant = worktree(~/.claude/worktrees/) 체크가 memory(~/.claude/) carve-out 보다 먼저(load-bearing subset — 뒤집으면 95건 무력화). Wave1 = warning-tier(stderr block 마커 + exit 0, NEVER exit 2, ADR-115 §결정 5 fail-open). 신규 파일 — hooks/pretooluse-inline-write-gate (extensionless polyglot, pretooluse-agent-spawn-gate warning skeleton 미러) + scripts/check-inline-write-gate.sh (ADR-061 thin wrapper, SSOT 부재 fail-open) + scripts/lib/check_inline_write_gate.py (verifier SSOT, _read_payload/_check_bypass/_classify_agent/_classify_path 4-func, check_repo_confinement.py _norm realpath 재사용) + hooks/tests/test_pretooluse_inline_write_gate.py (pytest 14-case discriminating fixture + §8.7 design-confirm 3종: MultiEdit live schema / distinct sentinel 2종 / relative-path cwd-resolve). hooks.json PreToolUse += Write|Edit|MultiEdit matcher. evidence-checks-registry += runtime-hook-pretooluse-inline-write-presence (5번째 family member, warning-tier, declarative anchor — presence-lint 기계배선은 family 전체 declarative-only 이므로 follow-up 분리). BYPASS_INLINE_WRITE_GATE env(audit trail, block 마커와 distinct sentinel). Wave2 deny 승격 = ADR-060 evidence-gate (PR≥20 + bypass 외 failure=0 + sibling merged) 후 별 CFP. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-039 Amd9 + ADR-115 Amd1 paired amendment) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.61.0 → 6.62.0 MINOR (신규 runtime hook = 기능추가, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2545 (2026-07-02) — Codex companion 브로커 경로 wall-clock 가드 배선 (ADR-081 Amendment 12 §결정 D14, dogfood wrapper-self Phase 2): 실 리뷰 worker 호출부 CodexReviewAgent.md:89 `node codex-companion.mjs adversarial-review --wait`(4 리뷰 lane 공유) companion `request()` deadline 부재 → stall 시 node·Bash·worker·Orchestrator 무한 대기(~2h silent hang carrier)를 `timeout ${CODEX_REVIEW_TIMEOUT_SEC:-300} --kill-after=${CODEX_REVIEW_KILL_AFTER_SEC:-30}` wall-clock ceiling 으로 근절. N=추정값 empirical 미실증(env-override, lock-in 금지) + lane override(_SECURITY/_DESIGN) + consumer hardcap 900s. exit 124(timeout kill) → fail-mode enum #8 재사용 marker `[codex-sandbox-fallback: dispatch_stall_or_stream_timeout]` + verdict=inconclusive (fail-open 금지 — PASS-only-if-explicit, exit 0+verdict부재=inconclusive, 부분 stall ANY→전체 inconclusive). AC-1 mechanical 강제 = presence-grep lint (scripts/lib/check_codex_companion_timeout_presence.py Python SSOT ADR-061 + thin wrapper + templates/+.github byte-identical workflow ADR-005): dispatch 발화 timeout <N> prefix(리터럴 or ${VAR:-int} env-default) + --kill-after 동반 + N 양수 + hollow-gate 차단 I-3(파일 존재 시 발화 ≥1, 발화 0건→exit1) + 경로부재 fail-open(consumer no-op). self-test 8-case RED→GREEN discriminating + mutation proof(가드 제거 시 PASS→RED firsthand 실증). evidence-checks-registry codex-companion-timeout-presence entry(warning tier) + label-registry-v2 hotfix-bypass:codex-companion-timeout-presence(2.102→2.103, 103번째 family). playbook §3.10 companion sub-paragraph(wall-clock ceiling + Orchestrator liveness 게이트 보조 2차 + timeout N < liveness max-wait 순서) + review-pl-base.md cross-ref. 신규 required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.60.3 → 6.61.0 MINOR (신규 companion wall-clock 거버넌스 behavior + 신규 wrapper script/workflow = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2530 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml job-level if: hashFiles(...) context-availability 위반 born-invalid gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정13 Amendment 2): hashFiles 는 step-level 전용이라 job-level if 는 workflow load-time schema-invalid → D1 게이트가 css-lint.yml 신설(PR #2511) 이래 0회 로드/실행. job-level if 삭제 → step-level 가드 + in-job fast-exit(경로C genuine pass) 단일 채널. 재발 봉인 = 신규 actionlint-workflows-test.yml(wrapper-self, job-level hashFiles 재삽입 mutation → actionlint exit!=0 hard-fail) + templates/ coverage. 양 copy byte-identical parity. PATCH 6.60.3. + CFP-2527 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml --config-basedir 누락 hollow-gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정12 Amendment 1): 격리 toolchain($RUNNER_TEMP/css-lint-toolchain/node_modules) 에 STYLELINT_BASEDIR GITHUB_ENV export + floor self-check(--print-config) 와 실 lint run 양쪽에 --config-basedir 부착 → consumer verbatim 채택 시 stylelint extends:stylelint-config-standard resolution 실패(ConfigurationError, rule 평가 이전 사망)로 게이트가 단 한 줄도 lint 못하던 reached-but-dead hollow-gate 복구. 양 copy(.github + templates) byte-identical parity. test-css-lint.sh C5 consumer-형상 discriminating fixture 신설. PATCH 6.60.2. + CFP-2523 (2026-06-30) — schema-lib archive/adr existence-guard dead-path 활성 + 10 ADR backfill (atomic Phase 2, CFP-2519 후속): check_doc_frontmatter.py REQUIRED + check_doc_section_schema.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS 에 "archive/adr" 키 확장-only 추가 — wrapper ADR(archive/adr/) 가 docs/adr-only 키로 silent skip 되던 existence-guard dead-path 활성. naive 활성 시 FAIL 할 10 ADR (frontmatter 1 = ADR-042-mc closing delimiter / section 9 = 116/117/118/122/127/128/129/132/133)을 3-way TYPE(안전 rename / 신규 섹션 from related_files / 상태 from frontmatter)으로 동일 PR HEAD tree 에 atomic backfill — 관련 ADR 류 섹션(127/128/129 ## 관련 + 133 ## 관련 ADR)은 보존 + 별도 ## 관련 파일 신설(의미오염 차단). 141 ADR 전수 PASS(fm/sec exit=0) 실측. consumer 무해(existence-guard). PATCH 6.59.3. + CFP-2519 (2026-06-30) — docs/adr→archive/adr dead-path 클래스 sweep (functional 3 + stale-ref 2, CFP-2515 후속, Phase 2): CFP-2515 가 adr-sunset-criteria.yml 단일 dead-gate 만 정정하며 남긴 동형 dead-path 클래스(wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하는 docs/adr-only path 패턴)의 잔여 sweep. wrapper 는 ADR 을 archive/adr/ 에 두고 consumer 는 docs/adr/ 를 써, docs/adr-only path 는 consumer 정상·wrapper-self 비대칭 dead-gate. entry.title: claude-statusbar
entry.content: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor with switchable styles, themes, slash commands, and a local AgentParty bridge for Codex workflows. v3.29.6 clarifies the support boundary: Claude Code remains the full native statusLine data source for quota/session/context/cache/activity fields; Codex support is the local AgentParty presence bridge and never calls AgentParty, reads tokens, makes network requests, or adds OpenAI quota accounting. v3.29.5 makes launchd/systemd-spawned daemons recognizable to `cs daemon stop` and the upgrade drift-kill (they were unkillable), and stops an exiting daemon from deleting the current owner's pidfile. v3.29.4 makes `cs upgrade` the single documented upgrade path and fixes the daemon's silent auto-upgrade failure under launchd/systemd (uv/pipx not on the service PATH). v3.29.3 fixes the same respawn loop on Linux/systemd (Restart=on-failure) and reads the new AgentParty listener.mentions_only contract field instead of probing argv. v3.29.2 stops launchd from respawning a redundant daemon every 10s and cuts warm render time from ~6ms to ~2.4ms. v3.29.1 fixes a daemon crash on any render slower than the tick interval (a negative time.sleep()) — the reason the daemon kept dying and never picked up upgrades. v3.29.0 redesigns the AgentParty block (monochrome glyphs, listening state stated outright, last message on its own line with unread/@mention markers) and fixes the listener heartbeat field that made every live listener render as `down`, plus three daemon defects that kept an upgrade from reaching the running daemon. Requires the cs CLI from PyPI (pip install claude-statusbar or uv tool install claude-statusbar).

entry.title: prd-spec-generator

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard — the mechanical seal runs as the deterministic forge-done.sh/.js script shared by every seal path, ADR-0030), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot, except that a retro concluding without a re-grill recommendation chains straight into the seal — ADR-0026; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that shows the current loop progress in your terminal statusline in one of two modes: append (method 1) auto-wraps your existing statusLine so forge shows as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), or merge (method 2) installs a forge-owned unified script rendering daleseo-style system info (model·effort·dir·git, plus context/usage/weekly usage bars) alongside forge progress in one command (ADR-0029), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: claude-mem
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent, compounding wiki vault plus an optional structural code graph (via graphify) wired into the same vault. Adds AGENTS.md project-profile skill for brownfield-codebase calibration. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, code-structure mapping, and cross-tool agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

entry.title: sdd
entry.content: Compressed spec-driven development. Seven commands (/sdd:design, /sdd:spec, /sdd:build, /sdd:check, /sdd:explain, /sdd:condense, /sdd:reorganize) over one SPEC.md. Telegraph encoding (about 40% token cut vs Claude prose re-expansion).

entry.title: build
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development for non-devs. A re-entrant, state-file-driven build pipeline that turns an idea into a shipped, dogfooded product one vertical slice at a time: a shaping gate and constitution up front, then per-phase spec → design → backend → review with outcome-only user gates. Resumes mid-phase after context loss. Trigger with /build.

entry.title: pattern-review

entry.title: slop-cop
entry.content: Detect and fix LLM-generated prose tells via the slop-cop CLI. Ships a self-review skill for the agent and bootstraps the binary on first use.

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: r2g-skills
entry.content: RTL-to-GDS-to-Graph skill collection. eda-install detects the machine and installs + verifies the open-source EDA toolchain (with a no-sudo conda path). signoff-loop drives an open-source EDA flow (Yosys + OpenROAD-flow-scripts + KLayout + Magic + Netgen + OpenRCX) from a spec or RTL to signed-off GDSII (DRC, LVS, RCX) with a self-improving fix/learn loop. def-graph converts the clean, signed-off physical design (DEF/LEF/SPEF) into PyTorch-Geometric graph datasets — five graph views (b–f), tech-lib/LEF parsing, and feature/label extraction.

entry.title: causal-powers
entry.content: Superpowers for data analytics, causal inference, and econometrics: discipline skills that make the silent failures of data work loud — data contracts, data preparation, join-cardinality checks, wrong-number debugging, result verification, pre-analysis plans, descriptive evidence (stylized facts, trends, summary-stats tables, distributions, and maps done honestly — composition checks, real-vs-nominal, rate-not-count), causal identification, structural estimation (demand/BLP, dynamic discrete choice, games, auctions, consideration, search), predictive modeling (applied prediction — leakage-safe evaluation, deployment-matched splits, prediction-is-not-causation), analysis craft, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, plan execution with parallel subagents, research-project organization, and a configurable R-first language profile. R, Julia, and Python.

entry.title: docs-skills
entry.content: Documentation review, writing, and workflow tools for AsciiDoc and Markdown documentation

entry.title: chaincompiler
entry.content: A compiler-compiler for cognition: invent a notation, gate it so the model can't malform it, compile it into a loadable skill, compose and organize them. Ships the meta-APE capability skills (make-prompt, make-persona, big-generator, persona-generator, forge-attention-chain, forge-cor, forge-skillchain, construct-language) — one per CC/*CC build-function — plus bandit-chain-system, glyphsteer, glyphsteer-dense and the Self-Interpreter MCP. Built on agent-prompt-engineering (APE, the prompt engine) over pydantic-stack-core, with the *CC (accc/corcc/sccc) made FROM chaincompiler. Requires the Python packages: ./install.sh, then `pip install fastmcp` for the MCP.

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.
